en.name: Level 58 — Water Wonder
en.shortDescription: An abandoned indoor waterpark of pools, corridors, cafes and storerooms, home to the Tribe of Tegan and a B.N.T.G. base.
en.atmosphere: Decaying amusement facilities where a primitive tribal settlement and an organized corporate outpost coexist in eerie duality.
en.tips: Avoid entities in the corridors. Befriend the Tribe of Tegan for resources and harvest ripe Tegan Fruit for food and protective skin.
